title: No More Structures: Essential
description: Removes all structures, besides the Stronghold, Nether Fortress and End Cities.
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

## Why
Part of early Minecraft's charm was the emptiness and loneliness of the world, the lack of structures making it feel isolated, yet more free and personal, as you stood on an untouched land.

## Mod's features
This mod tries to achieve this feel by removing all the non-essential structures, which means anything required to beat the game (Nether Fortresses and Strongholds) are still kept, the End City still included as the Elytra is still a game changing item unobtainable elsewhere.

_Supports 1.18.2 - 1.21_

## Notice
I will **not** be backporting to versions earlier than 1.18.2, as removing structures prior to that version is alot more difficult.
